message:
feat: Implement platform-specific support modules

_ios_support.zig:
- getDeviceFamily() with sysctl hw.machine detection
- getIOSVersion() parsing kern.osproductversion
- getMainScreenInfo() with simulator environment support
- hasBackgroundMode() checking environment for modes
- canOpenURL() with standard iOS scheme detection

_android_support.zig:
- getApiLevel() reading /system/build.prop
- hasPermission() with filesystem-based permission checks
- logcat() with stderr logging format
- hasNeon() reading /proc/cpuinfo for NEON features

_aix_support.zig:
- getAixBuildDate() parsing /usr/lpp/bos image.data
- detectXlcCompiler() searching PATH and well-known locations
- isAparInstalled() checking emgr.log for fixes
